justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference and then offered appropriate alternatives for the same day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered two alternative time slots for the same day when the initial request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent handled the request efficiently by checking availability and offering alternatives in a single turn, then confirming the booking in the next turn.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and providing suitable options.
